title: podocarpus brassii var. humilis
intro: Podocarpus brassii var. humilis is a slow-growing, evergreen shrub native to the tropical forests of New Guinea, belonging to the family Podocarpaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Podocarpus brassii var. humilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional remedies for colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or added to topical creams and salves for skin issues.
